headline: Unpacking Q1 Earnings: FactSet (NYSE:FDS) In The Context Of Other Financial Exchanges & Data Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at financial exchanges & data stocks, starting with FactSet (NYSE:FDS).
